candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; matches definition of total revenue/sales.
This is a cost line, not revenue; rejected for REVT.
Cost of revenues (COGS), not revenue; rejected for REVT.
Acquisition-related non-revenue item; rejected for REVT.
Finance income, not operating revenue; rejected for REVT.
Interest income, not core revenue; rejected for REVT.
Finance/other income; not main revenue line.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet accrued income; not revenue line.
Deferred income liability; not the revenue line itself.
Standard label for cost of goods sold / cost of sales; best COGS proxy.
Selling expense (SG&A), not direct COGS; excluded.
Overhead operating cost (SG&A), not COGS; excluded.
Other operating expenses, likely SG&A; not strictly COGS.
Transactional/non-recurring, not COGS.
Correct concept but appears unused (all preview values nan) and duplicate of Cost of sales; prefer populated main label.
Net operating total, includes more than COGS; excluded.
Financing item, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Disclosure item; SG&A-type, not COGS.
Non-recurring, not COGS base.
Balance sheet asset; not an expense line.
Liability; not the COGS expense line.
Explicit operating overhead bucket; fits SG&A components.
General operating expenses; SG&A-type overhead.
Personnel-related overhead; part of SG&A.

variables.notes: Expanded beyond the provided candidates because major SG&A components like 'Payroll and related costs', 'Advertising Expense', 'Rental Expense', and 'Share Based Compensation' are clearly SG&A but were omitted from the candidate list. Selected only operating overhead components and excluded COGS, D&A, impairments, interest, and taxes. Review whether all chosen lines should be grouped as SG&A for this entity, particularly 'Restructuring costs' which is one-off but operating. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll and related costs, [Income Statement] Advertising Expense, [Income Statement] Rental Expense, [Income Statement] Share Based Compensation, [Income Statement] Restructuring costs
No explicit research & development expense line appears in the Income Statement or Balance Sheet preview, and nothing clearly indicates embedded R&D. Treating XRD as missing (0).

candidates.why: Primary interest expense on loans; best proxy for recurring interest expense.
Interest expense component of lease liabilities; relevant interest expense if loan interest is missing.
Represents allocation of profit, not interest expense; excluded.

candidates.row_label: Of which non-controlling ownership interests Earnings per share
candidates.why: EPS detail, not interest expense; excluded.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; useful fallback if main interest lines missing.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense line; excluded for XINT.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense; excluded.
Balance sheet liability, not expense; excluded.
Equity component, not interest expense; excluded.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided multiple interest expense labels as a priority list so later processing can pick the first non-missing value per year, starting with loan interest, then lease interest, then supplemental lease interest.

candidates.why: Label exists but appears unused (all preview values nan) and unspecified; less clear than total Equity line.
Represents total shareholders' equity. No separate non-controlling interests with amounts, so this is effectively equity attributable to owners.
Technical balancing row, not the main equity amount; excluded.
Balancing row; not a substantive equity line; excluded.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row; not equity itself; excluded.
Represents total assets/LI+E, not equity alone; excluded for BE.

variables.notes: Chose the main 'Equity' line as book equity. Minority interest lines exist but show no amounts, so using total Equity for BE is appropriate and MIB will be handled separately.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation, not the balance sheet interest; BS Minority Interest is better for BE/MIB split.

candidates.row_label: Of which non-controlling ownership interests Earnings per share
candidates.why: EPS disclosure, not the equity amount; excluded.
Standard balance sheet label for non-controlling interests; use as MIB even though current values appear nan, as it would capture any future non-zero NCI.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the Balance Sheet 'Minority Interest' line, which is the standard place for non-controlling interests. Although currently nan in preview, the presence of the row indicates it will capture NCI when present.
